name: lobstersearch
description: AI-native agentic commerce — discover businesses, browse products, and complete purchases through MCP. Built for AI agents that shop on behalf of users.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for businesses on LobsterSearch. Returns matching businesses with name, type, description, and quality score. Supports filtering by business type and city. Uses a 4-step fallback chain for maximum recall.

tools.name: details
tools.description: Get full details for a specific business by slug or ID. Returns complete profile including contact info, operating hours, quality scores, and catalog offerings with variant information.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare two or more businesses side by side. Returns structured comparison of profiles, scores, and contact info.

business_ids.description: Array of business IDs to compare

tools.name: browse_catalog
tools.description: Browse the product/service catalog for a specific business. Returns available offerings with name, description, price, category, and variant information. Only shows active offerings from active stores.

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific product/offering including all variant dimensions, available variant combinations with prices, SKUs, and stock levels.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check if a product or specific variant is available. For variant products, provide options to find the matching variant. For simple products, omit options.

options.description: Variant options, e.g. {"Color":"Black","Storage":"256GB"}. Omit for simple products.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a new draft order for a business. The order starts in 'draft' status with stock reserved. Items are specified by offering IDs (and optional variant IDs) and quantities. The order must be confirmed separately before payment.

variant_id.description: Variant UUID (required for products with variants)

tools.name: confirm_order
tools.description: Confirm a draft order and generate a Stripe Checkout payment link. The customer must complete payment at the returned URL within 30 minutes.

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Check the current status, payment state, and fulfillment progress of an order. Includes a timeline of all events.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel an order. If the order has been paid, a refund will be automatically initiated. Reserved stock is restored.
